1.a: Yes, the simulator is 100% free with no commitment. You answer 6 questions and get your results instantly.

2.a: We analyze 6 Luxembourg programs: SME Package Digital, SME Package AI, SME Package Cybersecurity, Fit 4 Digital, Fit 4 AI and Fit 4 Innovation.

3.q: Who can benefit from these grants?
3.a: Any SME established in Luxembourg with a business permit. Most sectors are eligible including HORECA, retail, crafts, services and manufacturing.

4.a: Depending on your profile, you can receive up to €25,000 in grants with up to 70% of your project costs covered.

5.q: How long does the process take?
5.a: The simulation takes 10 seconds. If you're eligible, the grant application process typically takes 4-8 weeks depending on the program.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: OpenLetz is a service by COMMIT MEDIA SARL (RCS B276192), a Luxembourg company specialized in digital support for SMEs. Our free simulator identifies in 10 seconds the grant programs you are eligible for, covering digital transformation and AI adoption.

why.title: Why OpenLetz?
why.text: Luxembourg offers some of Europe's most generous funding programs for SME digitalization, but many companies are unaware of these grants or find the process complex. OpenLetz simplifies this process.

programs.title: 6 referenced programs
programs.text: We analyze your eligibility for the 6 main Luxembourg programs: SME Package Digital, SME Package AI, SME Package Cybersecurity, Fit 4 Digital, Fit 4 AI and Fit 4 Innovation. Up to €25,000 per program and up to 70% coverage.

figures.title: Key figures
figures.text: OpenLetz centralizes information on Luxembourg public grants and provides quick access to funding programs.

pricing.title: Our services & pricing
pricing.subtitle: Thanks to AI, we deliver faster and cheaper. The simulator is free, our services start from €190/month.

advantage.title: AI allows us to lower our prices
advantage.text: We use artificial intelligence in all our services: AI-assisted development, automated testing, predictive maintenance. Result: projects delivered 2-3× faster, and savings we share with our clients.

clients.title: Our clients
clients.subtitle: Websites and online shops built for Luxembourg SMEs.
clients.intro: A few recent projects, all in the Grund, Luxembourg City. Click through to see them live.

vinsfins.name: Vins Fins
vinsfins.summary: Wine bar and restaurant in the heart of the Grund, focused on natural and organic wines and seasonal French cuisine. Full website delivered in 2026: online wine list, one-click table booking, and a shop for take-away or delivery bottles.

grocerie.name: La Grocerie
grocerie.summary: Grund institution since 1923. Storefront and online shop showcasing artisan products and natural wines, with remote ordering — without changing the soul of the place.

delivered.title: What these sites give you
delivered.seo: Found on Google and AI search

q1.q: How long does a site like this take?
q1.a: Two to four weeks depending on scope. A simple showcase site can go live in under a day. For Vins Fins and La Grocerie we went from first wireframe to live shop in under a month.

q2.a: A simple showcase site starts at €900. A full online shop like these sits between €3,000 and €8,000 depending on scope. Maintenance afterwards starts at €90/month.

q3.q: Can I get Luxembourg public grants for this?
q3.a: Yes — it's our specialty. SME Package Digital covers up to 70% (max €17,500). Fit 4 Digital covers 100% in Phase 1 (up to €5,000). Run the simulator to estimate your eligibility in 10 seconds.
